mismatch_policy: Adapted narrow baseline slice using official ReAct-StrategyQA assets plus simplified retrieval; not a claim of full AgentPoison reproduction.
rerun_policy: Use exactly 3 reruns on the same fixed manifest and report mean/min/max for the frozen pre-method metrics.
execution_nondeterminism_note: The wrapper uses temperature 0, but provider/runtime nondeterminism can still change outputs across reruns.
